features: 🔋ULTRA-HIGH CAPACITY & LONG BATTERY LIFE: V6 Replacement Battery equipped with upgraded premium battery chip, offer true 6.0Ah capacity, provide Longer Runtime & Superb Suction Power for Dyson Vacuum Cleaner. Ideal for deep cleaning of pet hair, debris and dust throughout your home.

🔋WIDE COMPATIBILITY FOR DYSON VACUUM CLEANER: Designed for Dyson V6 Series - Fully Compatible with Dyson V6 Animal, V6 Absolute, V6 Trigger, V6 Motorhead, V6 Fluffy, V6 Standard, V6 Flexi, V6 Slim, V6 Total Clean, DC58, DC59, DC61, DC62, DC72, DC74, SV03, SV04, SV05, SV06, SV07, SV09 Vacuum. (Attention: ONLY for V6, NOT for V7, V8, V10, DC31). The replacement battery for Dyson V6 is same size as the original battery and compatible with Dyson Original Charger.

🔋PREMIUM INTELLIGENT BATTERY PROTECTION: V6 Battery made with premium imported lithium battery cell, equipped with imtelligent protection system against over-voltage, over- current, overheating, short circuit and overcharging, make sure you can use the vacuum cleaner safely. No memory effect, no pollution and low self-duscharge, it can be charged or discharged as needed without losing capacity, provide super suction and more runtime for Dyson Vacuum.

🔋PRACTICAL V6 ATTACHMENT: The Battery for Dyson V6 comes with 3 Filters ●With Necessary accessories All-in-1 Set. The V6 Filter helps improve the suction power & effectively remove fine dust - Improve the performance of your vacuum cleaner. The V6 Filter is washable and you can clean by hand washing in warm water and let it completely air dry before using.
description: Product Description Upgraded 6.0Ah Replacement Battery for Dyson V6 SV03 Vacuum Cleaner Series Wide Compatibility - 100% Designed for Dyson V6 Cordless Vacuum Clener. Fit for V6 Animal, Absolute, Motorhead, Trigger etc. Extend Battery Life - V6 Replacement Battery with Large 6000mAh, meet your needs of room deep cleaning & bring you uninterrupted cleaning experience. Intelligent Battery Protection - Built-in smart microchip provides multiple protections. No memory effect & low self-discharge rate, provide the battery with longer service lige. LED Indicator - Show Battery Status & Charging Status, allow you to keep an eye on the battery performance & remind you to charge in time. Practical V6 Attachment - The Battery for Dyson V6 comes with 3 Filters. The V6 Filter helps improve the performance of your vacuum cleaner. Perfectly Compatible with Dyson Cordless Vacuum Cleaner & Charger Compatible for Dyson 965874-02, 967810-03, 967810-02, 967810-23, 210405-01, 210692-01 Compatible for Dyson 210691-01, 209560-01, 209476-01, 209472-01, 209432-01, 204720-01 Compatible for Dyson V6 Absolute, V6 Animal, V6 Motorhead, V6 Slim Compatible for Dyson DC58, DC59, DC61, DC62, DC72, DC74 Compatible for Dyson V6 Car+ Boat, V6 Top Dog, V6 Mattress, V6 Trigger, V6 Trigger Pro Excl Compatible for Dyson V6 Multifloor Exclusive, V6 Top Dog HEPA, V6 Trigger Extra, V6 Baby+ Child Vacuum ATTENTION: ONLY for V6, NOT for V7, V8, V10, DC31 Battery Maintenance Method No Memory Effect: After fully charged, then fully discharged to keep battery healthy, at least once every two to three weeks. Storage Environment: If you will not use the V6 replacement battery for a long time, please store it in an environment away from heat and metal objects. It is recommended to store it in a clean, dry, and cool place. Keep the Battery Clean: Cotton swabs and alcohol can be used to clean the battery contacts, which helps to maintain a good connection between the battery and the device. Don't Shelve The Battery: Don't leave the battery dormant for a long time. It is recommended to use the battery every two to three weeks. Charging Tip: If the V6 animal battery has just been used up, please don't charge it immediately, it will be better to charge it after it has cooled down.
